title: kb.entry.graded v1
description: Emitted by kb (src/commands/grade.rs:205,248,310) for any of: `kb grade <entry>` (structural), `kb grade review <entry> <score>` (human/subagent verdict), or `kb grade all` (batch structural re-grade). Source: /kb.

old_grade.description: Grade before this update, from frontmatter; null if the entry had no prior grade.

source.description: Whether the grade came from automated structural scoring or a human/subagent review verdict.
